hero.headline: Green to *crystal clear* — that's what we do
hero.subheadline: Weekly service that shows up on time, every time. No surprises, no excuses.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every pool, every week, handled
services_section.subheading: Regular maintenance keeps your water crystal clear and equipment running right

services.title: Weekly Pool Cleaning
services.description: Skimming, vacuuming, and chemical balancing to keep your water clear all season long.

services.title: Equipment Service
services.description: Pumps, filters, and heaters checked and maintained so everything runs smoothly.

services.title: Chemical Balancing
services.description: pH, chlorine, and alkalinity adjusted to safe swimming levels every visit.

services.title: Problem Pool Recovery
services.description: Green or cloudy water? We'll get it back to crystal clear fast.

about.heading: Spartanburg's reliable pool team
about.body: We're the Spartanburg pool service that shows up when scheduled. James and Colton handle every pool with the same care — weekly maintenance that keeps your water clear and equipment running right.

reviews.name: Angie B.
reviews.text: Completely reliable and professional with on-time weekly service. Colton makes sure my pool and equipment run properly. Couldn't be more pleased with the knowledge he provides.

reviews.name: Tia T.
reviews.text: James and Colton turned our pool from green to crystal clear in no time! They've been a blessing to my family.

reviews.name: Scott P.
reviews.text: Colton responds quickly to every request and is very knowledgeable. Provides a personal touch with every service. Highly recommend this small local business.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Where we work
service_areas.subheading: Weekly pool service throughout the Spartanburg area

cta.heading: Ready for crystal clear water?
cta.body: Weekly service that shows up on time. Call for your free quote and see why Spartanburg trusts us with their pools.
